channel.title: releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important We try our best to have security releases of Drupal Core within 24-72 hours of being made available on drupal.org. Release Created Date Description 3.0.5 2019-12-21T20:43:45Z Features/Updates: Update Drupal Core to 8.7.11 Update Lightning 4.0.6; includes: Updated Lightning Layout to 2.5 Update contributed modules: Update acquia_connector to 1.18 Update embed to 1.3 Update layout builder restrictions Update metatag to 1.
